summary: Outstanding show with epic early second‑set performances; recording quality not described
review: The reviewer rates the concert a perfect five stars, highlighting that the first three songs of the second set are among the best they’ve ever heard. No details about the tape source or sound clarity are provided, so the audio quality remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review praises the musical performance heavily; lack of any recording‑quality comments forces a conservative estimate for audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention soundboard, audience, or any clarity issues; cannot assess technical quality beyond assuming it is at least listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer emphasizes that the opening three songs of the second set are epic, suggesting a strong start to the latter half of the concert.
